coverage_gaps: no mypy/pyright configured for plugins/sulis/scripts — type-check floor not run (none exists in repo)

architecture.note: test-only diff; no domain imports, singletons, circular imports, ports, or external calls. Fixture seeds via real record/worktree writers (MEA-09 real-adapter, not mock).

security.note: no secrets, no auth boundary, no injection surface. git worktree add uses fixed argv (no shell, no untrusted interpolation).

quality.cr10: no anti-pattern matches — list_all_changes() hoisted out of the 26-iter loop; git worktree add per change is the WP's explicit real-worktree requirement, not an N+1. No dead surface, no unused imports (ruff F401/F811/F841 clean).
